questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Tega and/or Molycop.
Identify alternative suppliers of grinding media in Australia and explain how their offering compares to Molycop’s.
Discuss the extent to which imported grinding media and mill liners are suitable alternatives to domestically manufactured products.
Do customers procure grinding media and mill liners at the same time, or separately from one another? Explain whether it would be practical to procure the products together.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.

subpoints.text: type/s of grinding media you procure (e.g. forged steel balls (Small/Medium/SAG), high chrome balls, and any other grinding media)
key factors that determine your choice of supplier

questions.text: Outline your supply arrangements for grinding media, including:

Outline your supply arrangements for grinding mill liners (for SAG mills and ball mills), including a. type/s of mill liners you procure b. your current supplier/s c. other potential suppliers, and d. key factors that determine your choice of supplier.
